sections.indemnity: Customer shall indemnify Vendor for any and all losses, including consequential damages, without limitation.
sections.liability_cap: Vendor's liability is limited to $10,000 in aggregate, no exceptions. Customer's liability is unlimited.
sections.ip: Contractor irrevocably assigns to Customer all intellectual property, including any pre-existing IP used in connection with the Services.
sections.data_protection: Vendor may process personal data as needed to provide the Services. No DPA attached.
sections.audit: Vendor's compliance is solely as represented by Vendor; no audit rights.
sections.termination: Customer may terminate at any time upon five (5) days notice. Customer shall have no liability for wind-down costs.
sections.assignment: Vendor may freely assign to any third party without notice. Customer may not assign without Vendor's consent.
